name: World Check Cashing Services
description_short: World Check Cashing Services offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at their Wilmington, CA location with extended weekday hours.
description_long: World Check Cashing Services operates a physical check-cashing storefront located at 849 W Pacific Coast Highway in Wilmington, California. The business serves the Los Angeles area community with financial transaction services typical of check-cashing establishments. Based on available information from their Waze business listing, the company maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week. The business is accessible via phone at (310) 518-6040 for customer inquiries. World Check Cashing Services provides check cashing as their primary service offering, along with complementary financial services common to the check-cashing industry. The company operates during standard business hours, opening at 9:00 AM on weekdays and closing at 6:30 PM Monday through Friday, with reduced Saturday hours from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Their location in Wilmington places them in an accessible area of Los Angeles County with established foot traffic and parking availability. The business appears to be a traditional brick-and-mortar check-cashing service without an apparent online presence beyond basic directory listings. World Check Cashing Services targets consumers who need immediate access to funds from checks without waiting for bank processing, as well as those seeking alternative financial services outside traditional banking institutions. The check-cashing industry remains relevant for unbanked and underbanked populations who may not have traditional bank accounts or access to banking services. Like most check-cashing businesses, World Check Cashing Services likely charges fees for their services, which should be verified directly with the establishment. The company's primary limitation is that it operates only as a physical location with no apparent digital or remote service options, requiring in-person visits for all transactions.
address: 849 W Pacific Coast Hwy, Wilmington, CA 90744

pros: Extended weekday hours (9:00 AM - 6:30 PM) Monday-Friday provide access outside typical 9-5 schedules
Saturday hours (9:00 AM - 5:00 PM) allow weekend transactions
Established physical location in Wilmington with phone support at (310) 518-6040
Accessible PCH location with established business presence in Los Angeles area
Multiple service options beyond check cashing including money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
cons: No online or digital service platform; all transactions require in-person visits
Limited geographic accessibility—only one physical location serves the broader LA area
Check-cashing fees not disclosed on public listing; rates must be verified directly
No website or digital presence to review services, fees, or policies before visiting
Operates as traditional brick-and-mortar only with no remote transaction capabilities
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked residents of Wilmington and nearby Los Angeles communities needing immediate check access
Consumers who prefer in-person financial transactions and need money orders or wire transfers
Workers paid by check who need same-day cash access without bank account delays
diagnosis: World Check Cashing Services is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Wilmington area who need immediate check-cashing services and can visit in person during business hours. The main caveat is that this is exclusively a physical location with no online services, and specific fee structures are not publicly disclosed—customers must call or visit to understand pricing before using their services.
